data.title: Fix: recipe-engine-adapter and registry schema missing cross-reference for min_engine_version / RECIPE_MIN_ENGINE_VERSION
data.description: The schema description and contract Standard Environment Variables table do not cross-reference each other. The schema's 'min_engine_version' field does not mention the corresponding RECIPE_MIN_ENGINE_VERSION env var, and the contract's env var table does not reference the registry field name. A reader of only one document cannot determine the mapping. Add a brief cross-reference in both locations. Files: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md and recipes/schemas/recipe-registry-schema.json
